text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: ae

Log:
  MFC r337469:
    Use host byte order when comparing mss values.

    This fixes tcp-setmss action on little endian machines.

    PR:		225536
    Submitted by:	John Zielinski

_U  stable/11/
